subcodes.first_line: O nightingale of inner meanings! Thy brilliant and peerless ode was noted, and was found to be of surpassing eloquence and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بلبل معانی قصیده غراء و فریده نوراء ملاحظه گردید در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت بود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
